summary: The user sought workout playlist recommendations to motivate them during their BodyPump weightlifting classes on Mondays at 6:30 PM. They also inquired about healthy snack options for work, meal prepping strategies, and incorporating protein shakes into their routine to support their fitness goals.
facts: The user participates in BodyPump weightlifting classes on Mondays at 6:30 PM. The user meal preps on Sundays and brings healthy snacks to work to cut down on junk food. The user is considering trying protein-rich snacks like Greek yogurt and hard-boiled eggs to support their weightlifting classes. The user is looking for protein powders that are easy to digest and taste good. The user has heard that whey protein is a popular choice for beginners. The user is interested in incorporating protein shakes into their routine, especially on days with BodyPump classes. The user is exploring ways to keep their snacks fresh and convenient at work.
